metadata.description: Object ID of the deploying user/SP (grants Key Vault Secrets Officer for secret creation). Populated by deploy script from `az ad signed-in-user show`.
Resource name prefix (used for all resource naming)
Location for all resources
SQL Server administrator username
SQL Server administrator password
Deploy Azure OpenAI (set to false when using external/shared OpenAI)
External OpenAI endpoint (required if deployOpenAI is false)
External OpenAI API key (required if deployOpenAI is false)
Name of existing Azure OpenAI resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing OpenAI resource (defaults to current RG)
Deploy Azure Document Intelligence for advanced document extraction (scanned PDFs, images, legacy Office formats)
External Document Intelligence endpoint (required if deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
External Document Intelligence API key (required if deployDocumentIntelligence is false)
Name of existing Document Intelligence resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Document Intelligence resource (defaults to current RG)
Deploy Azure AI Vision for image and diagram analysis
External Azure AI Vision endpoint (required if deployVision is false)
External Azure AI Vision API key (required if deployVision is false)
Name of existing Azure AI Vision resource to reuse (leave empty to deploy new or use external)
Resource group of existing Vision resource (defaults to current RG)
Azure AI Search SKU
Location for AI Search (override if SKU unavailable in primary location)
Allow all IPs to access SQL Server (test/dev only, default OFF)
Chat model deployment name (must match appsettings DeploymentName)
Embedding deployment name (must match appsettings EmbeddingDeploymentName)
Embedding model name (text-embedding-3-small or text-embedding-3-large)
Embedding vector dimensions — MUST match the deployed model (1536 for -3-small / ada-002, 3072 for -3-large). Propagated to Container Apps as Embedding__Dimensions. See ARCH_EmbeddingConfigOwnership.
Deploy Azure Key Vault for secret management (set to false for flat env var config)
Deploy Log Analytics + Application Insights for monitoring
Allow shared key access on storage account (set to false after migrating to Managed Identity)
Additional tags to apply to all resources (merged with default tags)
Deploy Container Apps for API, MCP, and Web
Container image tag (e.g., latest, v1.0.0)
Container registry server (GHCR)
Container registry username (only needed for private GHCR images)
Container registry password (only needed for private GHCR images)
API key for selfhosted authentication
JWT secret for selfhosted token signing

SuperAdmin password for initial setup. REQUIRED — must be >=12 chars with upper/lower/digit/symbol and must not contain admin/changeme/password/letmein/... (see AuthService.WeakPasswordList). No default: SEC_P0Triage §Rule 2 forbids shipping a known-weak credential with the infrastructure template.

SuperAdmin username for first-boot seed. AuthService.EnsureSuperAdminExistsAsync (SEC_P0Triage §Rule 3) hard-requires this; missing param breaks admin login on fresh deploys. Default "admin" matches skill docs + Web UI convention.
Chat model deployment name for Container Apps config
Embedding deployment name for Container Apps config
Embedding model name for Container Apps config (Embedding__ModelName)
Embedding vector dimensions for Container Apps config (Embedding__Dimensions). Must match caEmbeddingModelName.

properties.value: [format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog=McpKnowledge;Persist Security Info=False;User ID={1};Password={2};MultipleActiveResultSets=True;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))]

appLogsConfiguration.logAnalyticsConfiguration: [if(parameters('deployMonitoring'), createObject('customerId', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', format('{0}-logs', parameters('prefix'))), '2022-10-01').customerId, 'sharedKey', listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces', format('{0}-logs', parameters('prefix'))), '2022-10-01').primarySharedKey), null())]

configuration.secrets: [concat(if(empty(parameters('registryUsername')), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'registry-password', 'value', parameters('registryPassword')))), createArray(createObject('name', 'sql-connection', 'value', format('Server=tcp:{0},1433;Initial Catalog=McpKnowledge;Persist Security Info=False;User ID={1};Password={2};MultipleActiveResultSets=True;Encrypt=True;TrustServerCertificate=False;Connection Timeout=30;', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', variables('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName, parameters('sqlAdminUsername'), parameters('sqlAdminPassword'))), createObject('name', 'openai-endpoint', 'value', if(parameters('deployOpenAI'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', format('{0}-openai-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('location'))), '2023-05-01').endpoint, if(and(not(equals(parameters('existingOpenAiName'), '')), empty(parameters('existingOpenAiResourceGroup'))), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('existingOpenAiName')), '2023-05-01').endpoint, parameters('externalOpenAiEndpoint')))), createObject('name', 'openai-apikey', 'value', if(parameters('deployOpenAI'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', format('{0}-openai-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('location'))), '2023-05-01').key1, if(and(not(equals(parameters('existingOpenAiName'), '')), empty(parameters('existingOpenAiResourceGroup'))), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts', parameters('existingOpenAiName')), '2023-05-01').key1, parameters('externalOpenAiKey')))), createObject('name', 'search-endpoint', 'value', format('https://{0}.search.windows.net', format('{0}-search-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('searchLocation')))), createObject('name', 'search-apikey', 'value', listAdminKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Search/searchServices', format('{0}-search-{1}', parameters('prefix'), parameters('searchLocation'))), '2023-11-01').primaryKey), createObject('name', 'storage-connection', 'value', format('DefaultEndpointsProtocol=https;EndpointSuffix={0};AccountName={1};AccountKey={2}', environment().suffixes.storage, variables('storageAccountName'), listKeys(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', variables('storageAccountName')), '2022-09-01').keys[0].value)), createObject('name', 'selfhosted-apikey', 'value', parameters('apiKey')), createObject('name', 'selfhosted-jwtsecret', 'value', parameters('jwtSecret')), createObject('name', 'selfhosted-adminpassword', 'value', parameters('adminPassword'))))]
